RESERVE BANK OF INDIA
DEPARTMENT OF REGULATION
CENTRAL OFFICE, MUMBAI

Ref.No.DOR.IT.REC.12/21.04.048/2026-27
June 1, 2026

All Commercial Banks (including RRBs)
All Payments Banks
All Small Finance Banks

Master Circular - IT Infrastructure and Password Rotation

1. Background
In view of recent cybersecurity incidents targeting core banking systems, the Reserve Bank of India mandates an immediate strengthening of access controls.

2. Password Rotation Policy
All internet-facing endpoints and internal administrative accounts must enforce a strict password rotation policy. 
- Passwords for all accounts must be changed every 90 days.
- Minimum password length must be 14 characters.
- Password complexity must be enabled.
- Password history of the last 24 passwords must be maintained to prevent reuse.

3. Compliance and Evidence
Banks must submit the active directory configuration log demonstrating the enforcement of these policies.

Yours faithfully,
(Sudarshan Sen)
Chief General Manager
